description_long: This is a handmade, thick book with a rough, textured cover and visible hand-stitched binding along the spine. The front cover features a printed image of an art gallery scene, showing people observing framed paintings on a wall with a wooden floor beneath them. The edges of the cover and pages are uneven and slightly frayed, giving the book a rustic, artisanal appearance. The back cover is plain and unadorned, with visible stitching holes along the edge. The book appears to be composed primarily of paper, with a thicker, possibly cardboard-like material for the covers. The spine reveals the exposed stitching and the layered structure of the pages, emphasizing its handcrafted construction.
description: A thick, handmade book with rough, textured covers, visible hand-stitched binding, and an art gallery scene printed on the front. The edges are uneven and the spine shows exposed stitching.
description_view_0: The front cover displays an art gallery scene with people and paintings, and the rough, handmade texture of the cover is visible.
description_view_1: The top or bottom edge view reveals the thickness of the book and the layered, uneven pages.
description_view_2: The back cover is plain, showing only the rough texture and stitching holes without any illustration.
description_view_3: The spine view highlights the exposed hand-stitched binding and the layered construction of the pages.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a photographic or printed image of an art gallery interior, with several framed paintings on the wall and three people—two adults and a child—standing and observing the artwork. The scene is set against a wooden floor and a sky-blue wall, rendered in a realistic style.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is exposed, showing hand-stitched thread and the edges of the pages, with no visible text or decorative elements.
